name: Element.Hsl

values.name: fromHsl
values.comment: `hsl`, with named parameters. Nice for readability, if you're into that sort of thing.
values.type: { h : Basics.Int, s : Basics.Float, l : Basics.Float } -> Element.Color

values.name: fromHsla
values.comment: `hsla`, with named parameters. Nice for readability, if you're into that sort of thing.
values.type: { h : Basics.Int, s : Basics.Float, l : Basics.Float, a : Basics.Float } -> Element.Color

values.name: hsl
values.comment: Create a color from hue, saturation, and lightness.

values.name: hsla
values.comment: Create a color from hue, saturation, lightness, and alpha (opacity).

values.name: toRgb255
values.comment: Converts hue, saturation, and lightness to red, green, and blue, with each color represented by integers from `0` - `255`.
values.type: { h : Basics.Int, s : Basics.Float, l : Basics.Float } -> { r : Basics.Int, g : Basics.Int, b : Basics.Int }
